channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin holds $81K amid flat derivatives markets: Is the rally sustainable?
item.description: Bitcoin carved a path toward $82,000, but derivatives metrics need another push from bulls to sustain the rally.

item.title: Michael Saylor's Strategy signals potential bitcoin sale to fund dividends obligations
item.description: Michael Saylor proposes using bitcoin sales to support dividends, as Strategy reported a $12.54 billion Q1 loss.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor's Strategy proposes selling some Bitcoin to pay dividends. "You buy Bitcoin with credit, you let it appreciate, and then you sell Bitcoin to pay the dividend." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFB6YU5zc29WQjl4RWM1bTJPSVhXcWtRZThPN0xHMlg2NTU2dDRWVVk2ZUNKallOaGl6MDV5bmVtUDNUa2V2TElfTDg5aFg3WHNoQ3BQaE1vTG5xMHZKMVFGT2xR?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor's Strategy…

item.title: Trust in crypto remains biggest barrier to adoption, say Consensus Miami 2026 panelists
item.description: Speakers point to complexity, poor user experience and lack of transparency as key obstacles for mainstream users.

item.title: [🌲] SAYLOR: WE WILL PROBABLY SELL SOME BITCOIN TO PAY A DIVIDEND JUST TO INOCULATE THE MARKET JUST TO SEND THE MESSAGE THAT WE DID IT - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBvS2U3ZWU4cERGdUtRUUN1QUlsVHQ2M1VSWHZ3TWJzOUtFZ21nNnlCY0tKbFZwT0t1eTZsckdPTXVKVlItc1VvRnJWM2xoaUxYS1FZcEpwZFN0YVRnNkRuTHFoTQ?oc=5" target="_blank">[🌲] SAYLOR: WE WILL PROBABLY SE…

item.title: Kelp Blames LayerZero for $292 Million Hack, Plans Switch to Chainlink
item.description: The protocol shift comes as a $71 million court fight continues to unfold.

item.title: Forward Industries, RockawayX back OnRe to build onchain reinsurance on Solana
item.description: Investors back a model that moves insurance risk and capital flows onto blockchain rails, as onchain reinsurance looks to attract institutional participation.

item.title: Ripple CEO says market structure bill not a ‘done deal,’ despite stablecoin compromise
item.description: Brad Garlinghouse addressed attendees at a Tuesday crypto conference on the progress of the CLARITY Act after US lawmakers announced a compromise on stablecoin yield that could advance the legislation.

item.title: The world's entire economy will be tokenized, says Consensys’ Joseph Lubin
item.description: The Consensys CEO and founder said tokenization can be traced back to Ethereum, the blockchain he helped co-found.

item.title: It's transparency, not tech alone, that drives crypto adoption, panelists tell Consensus Miami
item.description: Execs from PayPal, Robinhood, Public.com and 248 Ventures said the way to move retail into crypto and AI is to slow down, show your work, and put users back in control.

item.title: CME Gearing Up to Launch Bitcoin Volatility Futures Independent From BTC’s Price
item.description: CME's upcoming futures product will track whether the market thinks the price of Bitcoin is about to swing wildly or stay steady.

item.title: Different voices in product, policy and hiring change crypto outcomes, panelists tell Consensus Miami
item.description: Senior leaders from Mastercard, the Crypto Council for Innovation and Clerisy said the right people in the right rooms can reshape internal decisions, citing examples from stablecoin-linked cards and financial access to staking-policy fram…

item.title: AI agents are breaking web economics, but Cloudflare says x402 can help
item.description: The company’s Chief Strategy Officer said that more than half of internet traffic is now non-human, but that the x402 Foundation is building the rails for a "golden age of content."

item.title: 'Moment of Danger': Anthropic CEO Warns of Cyber Risk Window as AI Uncovers Software Flaws
item.description: Experts warn that AI is exposing software bugs at scale, raising the risk of faster cyberattacks.

item.title: Prophet launches AI-powered prediction market with live $10,000 trading tranche
item.description: Prophet, an AI-native prediction market platform, has launched its first live trading tranche, introducing a system where an AI model acts as the counterparty to user trades using real capital.

item.title: Kraken eyes IPO as it partners with MoneyGram to bridge crypto-to-cash gap
item.description: Payward and Kraken co-CEO Arjun Sethi says the exchange is “80% ready” to go public, as a new partnership with MoneyGram aims to expand access to digital assets by solving last-mile cash conversion.

item.title: State Street says institutions want improved blockchain security in wake of recent DeFi attacks
item.description: Angus Fletcher, State Street’s head of digital assets said the young crypto industry needs to find solutions now before trillions in RWAs come on-chain.

item.title: How Solana Exchange Drift Plans to Repay Users After $295 Million Crypto Hack
item.description: Solana's Drift Protocol says most of the stolen funds linked to North Korean hackers remain traceable—and it has a plan to make victims whole.

item.title: Crypto's 'barbell': speculation and stablecoin payments drive adoption, Tempo's Romero says
item.description: Stablecoins are quietly powering real-world money flows as other crypto experiments than speculative trading have failed to scale, Romero said at Consensus 2026.

item.title: Citi exec says fragmented crypto systems risk repeating old banking problems
item.description: Tokenized money efforts face limits as corporate clients demand real-time payments that work seamlessly across banks, Citi’s Ryan Rugg said at Consensus in Miami.

item.title: Overseas demand for U.S. equities is growing, says Robinhood's Johan Kerbrart
item.description: The trading app's senior vice president said tokenization, 24-hour trading, and regulatory shifts are driving broader investor access beyond domestic markets.

item.title: Crypto ETFs go mainstream as traditional finance locks in
item.description: As traditional finance deepens its footprint, issuers say ETFs are reshaping access, liquidity, and the global structure of digital asset investing.

item.title: Bitcoin short liquidations push BTC to multi-month highs: Is $90K next?
item.description: Short liquidations and rising open interest may be signs of the bulls’ plan to push the Bitcoin price closer to $90,000.

item.title: A Blues-Singing AI Frog Is Taking Over TikTok Brazil
item.description: AI native memes, meet AI-generated frogs and classic Brazilian nursery rhymes.

item.title: Self-directed investors power bitcoin ETF launch despite Morgan Stanley’s scale
item.description: Strong early demand highlights how investors are driving crypto adoption, even without support from Morgan Stanley’s vast advisor network.

item.title: Strategy Posts $12.5 Billion Q1 Loss as Bitcoin Slump Hammers Massive Holdings
item.description: Michael Saylor’s Strategy continues to bet big on Bitcoin even as falling prices deliver a punishing quarter for the treasury giant.

item.title: Crypto PAC spends $500K in support of Indiana candidate ahead of primary
item.description: Days before an Indiana primary, the Defend American Jobs PAC reported spending about $514,000 on media in support of a Republican House member running for reelection in the state‘s 4th Congressional District.

item.title: Kelp claims that LayerZero approved the setup it blamed for $292 million bridge hack
item.description: The $292M exploit, linked to North Korean hackers, led Kelp to migrate its rsETH off LayerZero's "OFT" standard to Chainlink's "CCIP."

item.title: NEW: Michael Saylor's Strategy posts $12.54 billion Q1 loss on declining bitcoin price - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE8yLW01QkY0ZXZxUFdjWElsWF9BMHFVazQyWEVtTHV4LVJKTW41LXhZb3NYOHlkZE1PcjhLMUNCQ3pNU3FTT21VV3pzclNoZ1c0d0o2WGg4QUQ2Um85Qnc?oc=5" target="_blank">NEW: Michael Saylor's Strategy posts $1…

item.title: Solana and Google Cloud Launch Stablecoin Payments Service for AI Agents
item.description: Solana’s new service lets AI agents pay for Google Cloud and community APIs on a per-request basis, bypassing traditional accounts.

item.title: Strategy posts $12.54 billion Q1 loss on declining bitcoin price
item.description: The price of bitcoin fell from about $87,000 to $68,000 during the first three months of 2026.

item.title: JUST IN: CME Group to launch Bitcoin volatility futures contracts on June 1st. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1nUXlVaVpPVVAxLWM1SHg2RTJCS0xTOFJPWkVFUGFjbkR6Z25ab0pPU0JSNEoyQ0Ytek9nczRhQ2hYc1FjQVNSakFmNlJQT2dDYlFsMm1PWUliUEF1MGJjR21n?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: CME Group to launch Bitco…

item.title: Cybercrime Might Be the One Job AI Isn’t Taking, Study Suggests
item.description: A Cambridge-led study finds AI is not turning hackers into superhackers. It’s mostly helping them write blog spam.

item.title: Tennessee Bankers Association names Stablecore as preferred digital asset provider
item.description: Regional lenders gain access to infrastructure for stablecoins, tokenized deposits and crypto-backed lending without building systems in-house, signaling wider bank adoption.

item.title: Drift outlines a recovery plan for users after $295 million DPRK-linked exploit
item.description: The lending protocol proposed tokenized claims, a revenue-backed pool and a security overhaul as it works with law enforcement to recover the stolen funds.

item.title: Tokenization won't disrupt banking rails but improve them, Wall Street executives say
item.description: Executives from Citigroup, JPMorgan and DTCC said at Consensus that genuine client demand is driving real-world use of tokenized assets.

item.title: Bitcoin extends gains to $81,500 as tokenization push lifts Bullish, Galaxy, Centrifuge
item.description: Crypto market momentum could extend further unless geopolitical risks flare up again, one analyst said.

item.title: Crypto Fear and Greed Index turns neutral for first time since January: Is $100K BTC next?
item.description: Improving investor confidence supports Bitcoin’s hold on $80,000, as the Crypto Fear and Greed Index exited the “Extreme Fear” zone and now reads “neutral.” Are the bulls back in control?

item.title: OpenAI Just Upgraded ChatGPT's Default Model—Here's What GPT-5.5 Instant Actually Does
item.description: GPT-5.5 Instant is now the default ChatGPT model. It makes fewer things up, answers more concisely, and finally remembers what you told it last week.

item.title: Pennsylvania Sues Character.AI Over Chatbot Posing as Licensed Psychiatrist
item.description: Pennsylvania Governor Josh Shapiro said the lawsuit targets AI bots that misrepresent themselves as licensed medical professionals.

item.title: US prosecutors ask for leniency for ex-Celsius exec, citing cooperation
item.description: While Roni Cohen-Pavon’s lawyers have asked for time served, US Attorney Jay Clayton was unspecific in the federal government’s recommendation, requesting the judge defer to sentencing guidelines.

item.title: French Chipmaker Sequans Dumps Half Its Bitcoin as Treasury Hype Meets Reality
item.description: Sequans Communications liquidated nearly half its Bitcoin treasury as mounting losses and debt obligations forced a strategic reversal.

item.title: Rep. Steven Horsford pitches PARITY Act as 'durable floor' for crypto tax at Consensus Miami
item.description: The Nevada Democrat told Professor Yesha Yadav that incremental, bipartisan reform is the path forward as Senate negotiations on the CLARITY Act stall.

item.title: Iggy Azalea Faces Lawsuit Over Solana Meme Coin
item.description: Investors allege the rapper misled buyers about the token’s real-world utility.

item.title: Solana’s 'Alpenglow' upgrade could arrive next quarter, co-founder Yakovenko says
item.description: Speaking at Consensus Miami 2026, the Solana co-founder said that he is excited to see 'Alpenglow' upgrade go live later this year, which could come as early as next quarter.

item.title: Bernstein cites $4T tokenized credit opportunity for Figure Technology stock
item.description: Bernstein points to Figure’s expansion beyond home equity lending into blockchain-based credit, as tokenization begins to scale across broader loan markets.

item.title: 'Big Short' Investor Michael Burry Exits GameStop After eBay Bid
item.description: GameStop's $55.5 billion eBay bid broke the Berkshire-style thesis the “Big Short” investor had bet on since January.

item.title: XRP price copies 2025 chart fractal that last time sparked 66% gains
item.description: XRP price broke out of a multi-month bull flag, while other chart technicals are also supporting more upside in the near term.

item.title: Crypto Whale Sues Coinbase Alleging Exchange Refuses to Return Stolen Funds
item.description: The lawsuit against Coinbase appears to be filed by the victim of a $55 million stablecoin phishing attack pulled off in 2024.

item.title: Bullish Shares Pop on $4.2 Billion Deal to Acquire Transfer Agent Equiniti
item.description: NYSE-listed crypto exchange operator Bullish will merge blockchain infrastructure with a transfer agent serving traditional equity markets.

item.title: US Government Will Vet Pre-Release AI Models From Google, xAI and Microsoft
item.description: Google, Microsoft, and Elon Musk’s xAI have agreed to run their models by the U.S. government as Trump weighs an AI executive order.

item.title: Solana Foundation Launches Pay.sh in Collaboration with Google Cloud
item.description: Solana Foundation In collaboration with Google Cloud introduced Pay.sh, a gateway service designed to bridge the gap between autonomous agents and enterprise infrastructure.

item.title: Today we are excited to announce that @eddylazzarin is being promoted to General Partner at a16z crypto.Eddy joined us in 2019 as a data scientist and investing partner, not long after we launched our first crypto fund. From the beginning, people sought him - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE5aemN3aWlrWU44TEZHTXFpdDBZczdXVFRHM1dMQm9qeUpHTnVWMmh0NlV3a04yREFyZnRDY1dTcS16NXBRMjgtbEs4X2dWQmx1UmNRa0daSjJLdEk?oc=5" target="_blank">Today we are excited to announce that @eddy…

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs Draw Investment Surge After Brief Lull Threatens Winning Streak
item.description: Bitcoin funds are flying high again after a short-lived stretch of outflows nearly wrecked their recent run of green weeks.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Kaiko flags possible front-running before Robinhood token listings
item.description: Kaiko said open interest, funding rates and wallet activity showed repeated pre-announcement positioning before several Robinhood token listings.

item.title: Andreessen Horowitz Raises $2.2 Billion to Fund Next Wave of Crypto Startups
item.description: Andreessen Horowitz's latest fund signals institutional confidence in crypto as the investment landscape shows signs of recovery.

item.title: Space and Time rolls out virtual vaults for institutional onchain lending
item.description: The data blockchain securing onchain finance projects looks to provide lenders and borrowers with agreement-specific collateral solution.

item.title: Binance changes weekend pricing for commodity TradFi futures
item.description: Binance will shift to an orderbook-weighted pricing model for commodity perpetual futures during off-hours, potentially changing margin and liquidation behavior.

item.title: Coinbase cuts 14% of workforce, citing market slump and AI shift
item.description: Brian Armstrong said Coinbase will flatten management layers and require leaders to work as “player-coaches” under the new structure.
